page_content:
Repeatable to: 6 credits.

SLLC342 Film Comedy (3 Credits)

Comedy as a specific cinematic genre.

Prerequisite: ENGL245, FILM245, or CINE245; or permission of ARHU- School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department. Cross-listed with: CINE342.

Credit Only Granted for: SLLC342, CINE342, or FILM342.
